creator: asami@cs.berkeley.edu
text:
* If you don't want to force this on everyone, could the port query the
 * installer? E.g. "Do you want to install the man pages? N.B. This
 * involves fetching an additional ~1MB tarball."

You can use the NOPORTDOCS variable to check on this.  E.g.,

===
.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
DISTFILES+=	bind-doc-8.1.1.tar.gz

post-install:
	${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/doc/bind
	cd ${WRKSRC}/docs; ${INSTALL_DATA} *.txt ${PREFIX}/share/doc/bind
.endif
===

Satoshi
